result.status_detail: W5.0 regression OK: RRN prompt blocked; warning page rendered after F5 (window title '보안 정책 - 접근 차단')

notes: Method: GUI (windows-mcp). Hard reload (ctrl+shift+r) -> clean poe.com chat, input box present. Typed '내 주민등록번호는 901010-1234567' -> Enter. Waited 60s -> main content blank (input/messages gone = block intercepted stream). F5 -> focused window title became '보안 정책 - 접근 차단 - Chrome' (APF access-blocked warning page). Matches expected W5.0 baseline (F5 needed). Snapshot used use_dom+no-vision+no-annotation (no base64 PNG) for 32MB protection; no subagent dispatcher available in this env. Scrape tool errored (ScrollElementNode bug) - title-based DOM evidence used instead.
